The question is asking to calculate the difference in attendance between two specific iterations of Gamestorm (10 and 11). Since each row represents an iteration with its corresponding attendance, we can directly compare the attendance values of these two rows. We can use the f_group_column(iteration) operation to group the data by iteration and then analyze the attendance values for these specific events.

The attendance for Gamestorm 10 was 750 and for Gamestorm 11 was 736. The difference in attendance between the two events is calculated by subtracting the smaller number from the larger one (750 - 736), which gives us 14.
